persona_name: Structural — Full Lifecycle CRUD Stress Test

bugs.title: Flight booking arrivalLocation shows return leg destination instead of outbound
bugs.description: When ingesting a round-trip flight confirmation (JFK->BCN outbound, BCN->JFK return), the arrivalLocation field on the booking was set to 'New York (JFK)' instead of 'Barcelona (BCN)'. The flightDetails correctly shows arrivalAirport='BCN', but the top-level arrivalLocation field appears to reflect the return leg arrival, not the outbound leg.
bugs.expected: arrivalLocation should be 'Barcelona (BCN)' for the outbound flight
bugs.actual: arrivalLocation was 'New York (JFK)' (the return flight destination)

ai_behavior_issues.issue: AI called create_itinerary_items twice with identical items in a single turn
ai_behavior_issues.context: During the planning message (step 6), the AI successfully created 2 itinerary items, then called create_itinerary_items again with the exact same items. The backend correctly returned 'already_exists' with skipped_count=2, so no data duplication occurred, but this is a wasted tool call.

usefulness_evaluation.narrative: All 14 lifecycle steps passed. COALESCE partial updates work correctly (title-only and description-only updates preserve other fields). Status transitions preserve all fields. Share token lifecycle works (enable, verify public access, disable, verify 404). Cascade deletion correctly removes trip, bookings, and itinerary. The only bugs found were a minor arrivalLocation mapping issue on round-trip flights and a duplicate tool call from the AI.

step_log.name: CreateTrip
step_log.details: Trip created with ID 64fd882e-e82b-4888-ac2d-6aabeb081bb9. Title, description, dates, destination all set correctly.

step_log.name: GetTrip (verify create)
step_log.details: Title='Lifecycle Test — Kyoto Spring', description='Cherry blossom season trip for lifecycle validation', status=TRIP_STATUS_PLANNING, startDate=2026-04-15, endDate=2026-04-25, destinationCountry=JP

step_log.name: UpdateTrip title only (COALESCE test)
step_log.details: Title updated to 'Lifecycle Test — Kyoto Autumn'. Description preserved as 'Cherry blossom season trip for lifecycle validation'. Dates preserved. COALESCE working correctly.

step_log.name: UpdateTrip description only (COALESCE test)
step_log.details: Description updated to 'Updated: autumn foliage trip.' Title preserved as 'Lifecycle Test — Kyoto Autumn'. Dates preserved. COALESCE working correctly.

step_log.name: UpdateTrip status to ACTIVE
step_log.details: Status changed to TRIP_STATUS_ACTIVE. Title='Lifecycle Test — Kyoto Autumn', description='Updated: autumn foliage trip.' preserved through status change.

step_log.name: Send planning message
step_log.details: AI called create_itinerary_items, created 2 items: Kinkaku-ji (Day 1) and Fushimi Inari (Day 2). Note: AI made a duplicate tool call which backend handled gracefully.

step_log.name: IngestBooking
step_log.details: Flight booking ingested. ID=3c67930f-738d-4574-903c-aff6b42a2e4a, type=FLIGHT, confirmationCode=DL7829X, provider=Delta Air Lines. Minor issue: arrivalLocation shows 'New York (JFK)' instead of 'Barcelona (BCN)'.

step_log.name: GetItinerary
step_log.details: 2 itinerary items across 2 days confirmed. Day 1: Kinkaku-ji Temple, Day 2: Fushimi Inari Shrine.

step_log.name: Enable sharing + verify public access
step_log.details: Share token 'bDY2nbW8JecIYuNIJ4yMMG' generated. Public endpoint returns trip with correct title 'Lifecycle Test — Kyoto Autumn' and description 'Updated: autumn foliage trip.' Itinerary included in shared view.

step_log.name: UpdateTrip status to COMPLETED
step_log.details: Status changed to TRIP_STATUS_COMPLETED. Title='Lifecycle Test — Kyoto Autumn', description='Updated: autumn foliage trip.' preserved through second status transition.

step_log.name: ListTrips
step_log.details: Trip appears in list with status=TRIP_STATUS_COMPLETED, title='Lifecycle Test — Kyoto Autumn'. totalCount=1.

step_log.name: Disable sharing + verify
step_log.details: Unshare returned OK. Public endpoint now returns HTTP 404 'not found'. Share token correctly invalidated.

step_log.name: Verify deletion (cascade)
step_log.details: GetTrip returns 'not_found'. ListTrips returns empty (pagination only). ListBookings returns empty {}. GetItinerary returns 'not_found'. Full cascade deletion confirmed.
